name: Stripe
interviewFormat: 4-5 rounds: 1 phone screen, 2 coding/systems, 1 API design, 1 behavioral — heavy emphasis on technical depth and reliability
questionPatterns: design a payment processing system with idempotency
implement a rate limiter (token bucket / leaky bucket)
design a webhook delivery system with retry logic
how do you handle distributed transactions and partial failures
tell me about a time you built something that had to be extremely reliable
redFlags: poor API design (no versioning, no backwards compatibility)
no consideration for retries or partial failures
